entry.title: Where can I start to learn Large Language Models (LLMs) and SAP's Business AI strategy towards LLMs?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Navigating Large Language Models fundamentals and techniques for your use case​ learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will provide you a description of Large Language Models (LLMs) and SAP's Business AI strategy towards LLMs along with techniques and methods for optimal LLM performance for your use case.

Learning objectives
Developers and Data Scientists will identify SAP's generative AI strategy,  identify techniques for optimal LLM performance, Retrieval Augmented Generation or RAG, fine tuning, and evaluating LLM performance.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: mergedog parameters - LOADED and CURR
entry.content:
and of course, after searching and not finding it.. .i found it

https://me.sap.com/notes/2057046

entry.title: Gating Factor Date - View Gating Factors app SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to understand the meaning of the Gating Factor Date mentioned in the View Gating Factor App.

How is it calculated and what is the base date it is using? (Requested Date?)

SAP help does not provide an actual explanation or example of how it used.

Thanks.

Rgds

Harald

entry.title: Re: Partial settlement not reversing accruals in Settleme...
entry.content: Hi， Can you share Pricing Procedures for your Sales Rebates that about the contract Type ZS01(Delta accrual and Partial settlement). Thank you very much! We used the Standard Pricing Procedures：A10005、A10006 but not work. We hope you can help. Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone maximum characters in text widget
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm integrating data from an external database into SAP Build Workzone and I have a question about the Text Widget. Our data includes text fields that vary in length from 500 to 3000 characters. Does anyone know what the maximum character limit is for the text widget in SAP Build Workzone?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Screen enhancement for EK92 - Payment plan creation
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are looking to enhance EK92 screen to make the Alternate Start Month field uneditable so that users won't be able to put any value over there. This a business requirement.

As I tried to get any suitable screen exit, I couldn't find any for EK92. Can I get any suggestion on this? 

Or should we still allow the business users to put value in Alternate Start Month and remove the value in the backend before it creates the payment plan? 

 

Thanks in advance!!!

entry.title: Re: Problem when uploading SAP HANA Readiness Check
entry.content:
Hello,

I am sorry for the delay in responding. I only became aware of this post today.

If you still face this issue, please create a customer case using the component SV-SCS-S4R. We may ask you to upload the data archive to the support case so we can check the file's structure.

Best Regards,

Greg

entry.title: In which tables are the fields in the master data kept ?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to have an understanding on the tables, but I don't find too much documentation on it. In which tables are the fields in the master data kept and how can I see them?

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards,

Berk

entry.title: How to show custom Data in a Fiori App (RAP)
entry.content:
How can i show Data in a Fiori List App, when the Data is not in a Database. Every tutorial i did for SAP Fiori Apps included CDS Views, which only showed Data from a Database.

So Is there any way to show Data in the List App when the Data is not in a Database?

I am sorry for the delay in responding. I only became aware of this post today.

If the issue persists, please create a customer case using the component SV-SCS-S4R. We may ask you to upload the data archive to the support case so we can check the file's structure.

Greg

entry.title: cancel Differrence on SAP

Hello everyone.

 

Perhaps someone can explain how I can cancel without incurring a written-off difference on SAP.As it was by mistake uplift stock and now I need to write-on difference and when can adjust the stock, but maybe are way just cancel

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Release - CMP-24566 - Import not working with...
entry.content:
Hi @CSmith,

I have all the permissions setup correctly, but still receiving the same error.

I raised an incident in the SAP SF support and they got back to me saying it is a known issue and the product team is working to fix it.

I will wait until I receive a fix on this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Characters limitation when using Georgian Unicode text
entry.content:
Besides the field character standard limitation, when using Georgian Unicode text (maybe other Unicodes have the same issue) character capability is even lower than the standard. For example, the latest goal management allows 2000 characters for the description field, but when using Georgian Unicode this number is even lower. Same for the job responsibility name.

If there is a standard solution, or if there are any changes planned, or if there is a workaround?

thanks,

Best Regards

entry.title: Cannot create a Single-date Order ECO using a custom OData service
entry.content: In SAP Business ByDesign (byD), the OData Editor allows the creation of Custom OData Services. We are trying to create a new Engineering Change Order of type Single-date Order using a custom OData service but it is always failing. We have isolated the problem in a smaller custom OData service but the problem is still the same. We are able to create a Standard Order (so the service works) but if the creation of a Single-date Order is attempted, it is failing because the StartDate is required. Trying to add the StartDate into the custom OData service does not work: trying to call the service does not create the new ECO. Is there a way to create a Single-date Order ECO using a custom OData service?

entry.title: Re: CORS status error REST API Sap Build Apps
entry.content: Hi, how can I solve this problem (CORS -Does the server allow CORS?status: undefined) when I want to use the AI Core API or any other API which is available in the SAP SAP Business Accelerator Hub?

entry.title: Re: GTS- No data available to request vendor-based LTVDs
entry.content: Hi Naveen, did you find a solution? We have the same problem and I can´t find a solution.

entry.title: Different kind of message in automatic credit control (OVA8) in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
I'm facing the following problem in credit management: 

The customer is demanding:

- An error message per step 010 that checks credit limit in the checking rule

- A warning message per step 020 that checks maximum document value

but the kind of message only can be set up in risk class and is unique for all checking...

Anyone knows if there is a way to cover this demmanding?

Thanks in advance and best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud 2000 rows limit
entry.content: Is this up to date?

entry.title: Re: Alias Table in Database View
entry.content: You cannot use ABAP database views in ABAP database views, according to the editor. So how did you manage to do that?

entry.title: Inventory Procedure With a Modified SKU
entry.content:
An interesting problem. Looking for a more effective solution.

We keep inventory of blank drinking glasses. Some of these glasses get logo'd though a 3rd party vendor. Usually it's in and out, but a minority are inventoried. All current logo glasses have there own unique sku that identifies it as a specific logo glass. 

There is an additional cost to these logo glasses. 

- Currently we have a main number (blank glasses).

- We issue purchase orders to the third party vendor that does the logo job. 

We manually do inventory adjustments once the finished logo glasses come in (deduct from main sku / increase specific logo glass sku). 

Any suggestions how these can be automated better, keeping in mind that costs need to be accurately factored in ?  

We are using SAP B1.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Standard report to display char. attributes
entry.content: Can you provide me the FS & TS for this report

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content: I was able to fix the error mentioned in my previous comment by editing the EDMX file (removing one schema).

entry.title: Expanding Our Horizons: SAP's Build-Out and Datacenter Strategy for SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
We are excited to announce details about our commitment to expanding our SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) global footprint.

As a part of our datacenter and deployment strategy, we are working to make SAP BTP available to more locations and businesses worldwide. With this step, we enable SAP’s business applications to consume modern technology services across the globe – like enabling intelligent business processes by embedding AI-based scenarios, making BTP even more accessible for our customers and partners.

We plan to expand SAP BTP availability into 10+ new datacenter regions by the end of 2025 based on the collaboration with our infrastructure partners.

This current plan includes new BTP regions in Israel, Brazil, Australia, Japan and Saudi Arabia. Further details on additional locations and timeframes will be announced soon. Please also check our Road Map Explorer for details.

 "As we embark on a journey to broaden our SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) footprint worldwide, we are dedicated to increasing the availability of our data centers. By offering SAP BTP in more locations, we enhance its appeal to customers and partners, enabling intelligent global business processes through seamless integration.”
Dr. Michael Ameling, Executive Vice President  & Chief Product Officer of SAP Business Technology Platform 

In addition to the expansion into new datacenters, we are also increasing the regional availability of SAP BTP applications and services within the existing SAP BTP locations, and align services’ availability between the different geographical regions.

You will soon be able to consume our flagship SAP BTP solutions from a local datacenter in every country that offers an SAP BTP presence:

  • SAP Integration Suite
  • SAP BTP, ABAP Environment
  • SAP Build Code
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Work Zone
  • SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Datasphere and
  • SAP Analytics Cloud 

We are committed to enabling businesses to run at their best, across the globe. This expansion of SAP BTP is a significant step towards that commitment, allowing us to serve our customers and partners better and bring the power of SAP BTP to new markets. We look forward to sharing more updates on this exciting journey with you!

entry.title: 7KE1 Plan / Costs / Revenues
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Looks like 7KE1 / 2 / 3 / X is not valid anymore in our S/4 New Version (Function is not available).

Do you have any input on that?. What s the alternative to fill revenues & expenses forecast by Profit Center / Cost Center / General Account ?

Thanks for your lights!!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA and SAP CX Integration Overview
entry.content:
Hello Alex Shipilov,

what is the picture about integration scenarios

1. SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Sales+Service)

2. SAP CX Sales and Service Cloud Version 2

3. SAP Field Service Management

Any official blog including process/data flows like the one you already provided regarding this updated application scenarios?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards

Marco

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA Cloud (Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hi @Shakeel_Ahmed ,

Thanks for providing the inputs on Adv FCV, based on your blog we started using this Adv FCV functionality. 

when we are posting a FX Revaluation it is posting with Document type SA, where as in Valuation method we have maintained as SR document type.

Can you please help from where this Document type SA is deriving while posting the Revaluation document in Adv FCV.

entry.title: Re: How to add column based on existing columns to existing table without header line?
entry.content: Aah thank you! That's what I thought but then I figured it couldnt be the case because I thought that '<line>-percentage_available =' meant that you were adding a new column to the table called 'percentage_available'. So then it would make sense that until now it didn't exist. But if it doesn't do that, what does it actually do?

entry.title: Avoid new deliveries for a purchase order
entry.content:
Hi, I need some help on how should be the logic to avoid the creation of a new delivery for a purchase order.

I tried through abap code at USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE of MV50AFZ1, but with no luck.

      SELECT vbeln posnr vgbel vgpos
        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_lips
        FROM lips
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN xlips
        WHERE vgbel = xlips-vgbel
          AND vgpos = xlips-vgpos.

      SORT lt_lips BY vgbel vgpos.

      LOOP AT xlikp ASSIGNING <fs_likp> WHERE updkz NE 'D'.
        LOOP AT xlips ASSIGNING <fs_lips>
                         WHERE vbeln EQ <fs_likp>-vbeln
                           AND updkz NE 'D'.

          READ TABLE lt_lips TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY vgbel = <fs_lips>-vgbel
                                                             vgpos = <fs_lips>-vgpos BINARY SEARCH.
          IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            MESSAGE e002(zmm76).
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Additional Account assingment to a contract object
entry.content:
Hi,

Please suggest how we add additional account assignments for a contract object.

For Instance: Use Cost Center and a statistical Internal order to be assigned to one contract object

Currently there's just one field available for Account assignment object is available which we are using for cost center but we need an additional field for Internal Order:

entry.title: What is the difference between row types and structures?
entry.content: As far as I understand, both focus on one line of a table and both say something about the data type in each field of that row. I see them both as 'blueprints' for how a table could look. Could anyone explain the difference between the two in terms of what they hold and what they are used for?

entry.title: FIS Invoice Approval Error in Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Could you please help on the below error, Many users are getting this error while approving Invoices from Fiori.

I am not able to find anything specific, This is a standard SAP

entry.title: Re: CF Deployment Error: Error getting tenant t0
entry.content: Perhaps you can confirm that the issue is indeed the second service-manager instance. Selecting between multiple bound service instances is currently not straight forward in CAP. But when I tried, both tag and plan appeared to yield the desired result. Before spending time on fixing that it would be good to confirm that the that problem to solve is indeed that. For example, does the error disappear if you unbind the second instance from sidecar and restart it? What is the order of bound services in VCAP_SERVICES, which plan comes first?

entry.title: Re: How to show custom Data in a Fiori App (RAP)
entry.content:
yes, try custom entity

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between row types and structures?
entry.content:
"Row type": see Line type - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com). Can be of type structure or any other type.

"Structure": see Structure - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com). Can refer to a type or a data object.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - How to do Data Refresh for Marketpla...
entry.content: This idea worked out for me Basic List with selection and Basic table 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to add column based on existing columns to existing table without header line?
entry.content: The code is just incorrect, so "it does nothing". Why do you think it should do something?

entry.title: Re: KSV5, Sender Tracking Factor come from where?
entry.content:
Hi @xiaozhuzhu please check actual cost posted in GL 50010010 in receiving cost centers using report S_ALR_87013611 that will be your receiver tracing factor.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: HANA DB usage of JSON embedded functions
entry.content: Take a look at the JSON_TABLE function. It will present the result of the function as a table structure which can then be referenced as a table in other queries: JSON_TABLE Function (JSON)

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to group all open items into a single...

entry.title: Re: Handling Inventory Adjustments with Posting Dates in...
entry.content:
Hello @will7321 you can open special posting period like 13 & make neccesary adjustments, while posting give posting date as 31.12.20XX & period 13.

 

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: BRF+ data Validation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have BRF+ table where i created decision table with three columns plant, profit center and indicator.

I have a condition for a PLANT and ACTIVE X indicator combination if the value already exists in decision table it should throw an error when user tries to create the same entry.

Input Fields = PLANT, INDICATOR

Output Fields = PROFIT CENTER

1)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 12XError - profit centre already active for this plant
     
     
     
2)Plantprofit centreIndicator 
 Plant 11X 
 Plant 21XPossible

I tried using Rule Set and Custom Exit but unable to validate existing entries using loop.

I am new to BRF+ Concept so any help would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: PN da Fatura de adiantamento diferente do PN da nota S/4 HANA
entry.content: Estamos com um impasse na utilização da fatura de adiantamento a fornecedor, pois quando compramos em marketplaces avista  PN para pagamento é sempre o mesmo, mas o PN da NFe oscila. Não temos conhecimento do PN da NFe no ato do pagamento.

entry.title: Print Array in email, Fiori application - (webcontent) SAP BUILD automation, not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I downloaded a project from SAP BUILD store, and it contains WebContent (html files) which triggered from workflow. I need to print table (array) in email.

In html file, I am able to print  ${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode} but not able to print complete table as an array ${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode}

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

<table id="assetTable">
        <tr>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">From CostCente</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Capitalization Date</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">**bleep**. Acquis. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Accum. Dep. Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Net Book Value</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Transfer</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Amount Posted</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To CompanyCode</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Asset Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Sub Number</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Description</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Class</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">To Cost Center</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold">Asset Status</td>
        </tr>
    </table>
        <tr></tr>
        <script>
            populateTable();
            function populateTable() {
                const table = document.getElementById("assetTable");
                var assetItem = [];
                assetItem = $.context.assetDetails.assetItem;
                assetItem.forEach(item => {
                    const row = table.insertRow(-1); // Inserts a row at the end of the table
                    Object.values(item).forEach(value => {
                        const cell = row.insertCell(-1); // Inserts a cell at the end of the row
                        cell.textContent = value; // Sets the text content of the cell
                    });
                });
            }
        </script>
        <tr></tr>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromCompanyCode}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].fromAssetdescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].cumulativeacquistionvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].accumulateddepreciationvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].netbookvalue}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].transferPercent}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].amountposted}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetSubNumber}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toAssetNumberDescription}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetClass}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].toCostCenter}</td>
        <td>${context.assetDetails.assetItem[0].assetStatus}</td>        

    <pre>${context.internal.successMsg}</pre>
    <pre>${context.internal.errorMsg}</pre>

    <br><br>
    <p>Thank You.</p>

entry.title: Use CRUD Opreations with SAP Datasphere Command-Line-Interface
entry.content:
Using the Command Line Interface (CLI), it is possible to implement processes and interactions without the user interface in the Datasphere and to automate them using Node.js scripts, for example. An important feature for the usefulness of the CLI in the context of the Datasphere is the provision of CRUD operations, which are considered basic operations in the handling of data elements. CRUD is an acronym and stands for C - creating data elements, R - reading data elements, U - updating data elements and D - deleting data elements. The handling of the individual elements is shown below. It is possible to edit a list of objects:

 

Object NameCommand
Local Tableslocal-tables
Remote Tablesremote-tables
ER Modelser-models
Analytic Modelsanalytic-models
Task Chainstask-chains
Data Flowsdata-flows
Replication Flowsreplication-flows
Transformation Flowstransformation-flows
Data Access Controlsdata-access-controls
Business Entitiesbusiness-entities
Fact Modelsfact-models
Consumption Modelsconsumption-models
Intelligent Lookupsintelligent-lookups
Contextscontexts
Typestypes

The local tables serve as an example for illustrating CRUD operations in this blog. The following command serves as the basis for handling CRUD operations:

 

 

datasphere objects [object-type][commands]

 

 

After the command has been executed, you are forwarded to a dialog. The space ID must always be specified here and, depending on the command, a JSON file to create an object, the technical name of an object to delete it or both to update a view.

Create
The objects listed above can be created using the following command:

 

 

datasphere objects local-tables create --space "Space ID" --technical-name "viewName" --file-path "path.json"

 

 

Make sure that a JSON file is used as the basis for the objects. The following template can be used for local tables:

 

 

{
    "definitions": {
      "Template": {
        "kind": "entity",
        "@ObjectModel.modelingPattern": {
          "#": "DATA_STRUCTURE"
        },
        "@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities": [
          {
            "#": "DATA_STRUCTURE"
          }
        ],
        "@EndUserText.label": "Template",
        "elements": {
          "Column1": {
            "type": "cds.Decimal",
            "precision": 38,
            "scale": 19,
            "@EndUserText.label": "Column1"
          },
          "Column2": {
            "type": "cds.String",
            "length": 4,
            "@EndUserText.label": "Column2"
          }
          ,
          "Column3": {
            "type": "cds.Integer",
            "@EndUserText.label": "Column3"
          }
          ,
          "Column4": {
            "type": "cds.Date",
            "@EndUserText.label": "Column4"
          }
          }
        }
      }
    }

 

 

 

Read
The following command can be used to read the objects listed above. A JSON file is returned here. The JSON file is filled with the semantic information of the object and, depending on the object, is similar to the template provided for local tables.

 

 

datasphere objects local-tables read --space "Space ID" --technical-name "viewName"

 

 

Update 
The objects listed above can be changed using the following command. Updates can be made via changes to the JSON file. It is recommended to execute a read command first and to change the JSON file that is obtained by the read command.

 

 

datasphere objects local-tables update --space "Space ID" --technical-name "viewName" --file-path "path.json"

 

 

Delete
The objects listed above can be deleted using the following command. By specifying the space and the technical name, the objects are uniquely identified and can therefore be deleted.

 

 

datasphere objects local-tables delete --space "Space ID" --technical-name "viewName"

 

 

For further information, please check SAP Help.

Example 1 - Creating and Deleting a Local Table
A simple use case is described here, in which a local table is created and deleted again. Both take place in a space called "CLI". In the first step, a JSON file is required. In this example, the previous template is used as the file. Once you have prepared the file for your requirements, you can execute the Create command. As can be seen in Figure 1, no parameters are specified in the command, which is why a dialog takes place via the CLI. Here you can enter the space ID and the path of the JSON file. If everything has worked, you should get a successful response. The table should then be generated as shown in Figure 2.

Figure 1 - Create Command

 

Figure 2 - Space on Datasphere with Table created via CLI

 To delete the table, you need the delete command listed above. Again, no parameters are specified here, which is why you have to specify the space ID and the technical name of the object in a dialog. By specifying the correct object, it is deleted from the space.

Figure 3 - Delete Table via CLI Command

 

Example 2 - Read an object and create it in a new space
This scenario represents a useful process for exchanging objects in a space-to-space sharing via the CLI. In addition, such logic could be partially automated using scripting languages so that all or selected objects can be exchanged by specifying the source space and the target space. However, only a simplified use case is shown here in the blog, which is intended to represent the basic function. 
Unlike above, in this example the commands are executed with the addition of parameters. First, an object must be selected, which is written to a selected directory via the CLI in the following step. Once the object has been successfully written to the directory, it can be created on the other space in the next step. As the technical name only has to be unique within a space, this step also works without adapting the JSON before the upload. Once the JSON file has been uploaded with the correct parameters, the table should be available in both Spaces, as you can see in figure 5.Figure 4 - Read and Create in a space-to-space sharing process

 

Figure 5 - Table in both spaces

 Both use cases are relatively simple in this scenario, but efficient. As already mentioned, the use cases can be expanded very widely and offer huge potential. If you have any questions about CLI or if you have an exciting use case, please feel free to get in touch.

entry.title: ISSUE to Disable Latest Goal Management 1H2024 Preview Release
entry.content:
For this 1H2024 Release it was communicated that have the option to disable the Latest Goal Managment. Since my company is not ready yet to enable this new version I tried to Disable it on Preview Instance but noticed it wasn't disabled at all. 

It is still showing the new appearence with a warning that says "Unconverted goal plan template, please contact your administrator for template conversion. To access the goal plan now, siwtch to the legacy view." And adds a link to the legacy view. 

This is a BIG impact on my company because people are not familiarized with this, and we are talking of about 300K people. 

¿How can i manage to fully return to the legacy version?

entry.title: Re: Dynamic SemanticObject for Intent Based Navigation in...
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

 

Sorry for not getting back to you. I have been diverted to other project and could not look into this. However, I have started looking into this once again.

 

Glad that you could achieve it at your end. Can you please provide more details on the local annotations which you mentioned and how you can integrate when user clicks on the link on one of the fields from the table?

 

Thank you,

Bhavik

entry.title: Lookup logic in Integration suite
entry.content:
What is typical recommendation for performing lookup in Integration suite. We have a flat file that is generated out of SAP.  Partner requires additional details that are not available in standard program and needs to be retrieved from S/4. 

In ECC days, we would not hesitate to customize the standard program (either through enhancements) to update the file. 

Considering the push to clean core paradigm, Would it make sense to generate the standard file and then do S/4 lookup in integration suite keeping the S/4 core clean?

What are typical best practice recommendations in such scenarios?

entry.title: Re: Dynamic SemanticObject for Intent Based Navigation in...
entry.content:
Hi Bhavik,

as mentioned above, here the local annotations:

 

                        <Record Type="UI.DataFieldWithIntentBasedNavigation">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="AppName" />
                            <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" Path="AppSemanticObject" />
                            <PropertyValue Property="Action" Path="AppAction" />
                        </Record>
 
The App* fields are the OData elements with the values at runtime, each table entry different values.
 
Best regards
Michael

entry.title: odata Metadata issue for standard service
entry.content: I am seeing an issue with the standard odata service delivered by SAP where function import parameters are not appearing correctly in the metadata. When I copy the standard project to custom and generate service, it shows all parameters as expected in metadata.

entry.content: Can we schedule back ground job in c4c version 2. I cannot find any option for it. can we somehow achieve it using any backend code.

entry.title: Re: how to enter time for a terminated contingent worker?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Hyuk_Oh 
Sounds good it does not die after full SGEN 🤓. Last time I comitted the 1909 container to a new image for backup purpose, the result image size was already double of SAP original w/o doing any SGEN. Do not know what I did 🦉,the instance was not under heavy use, just me.

entry.title: SAP is committed to taking action if finds a security breach, where is that commitment?
entry.content: SAP carries out ethical hacking, if SAP finds something, how will it notify you?

entry.title: Re: Systemcopy sap QAS longTime
entry.content: I used sapinst and went to systemcopy homogeneous, and exported the central instance data base. then I went to the target server with the same operating system configuration, SQL server and ran sapinst, I went to target and followed the steps. My base has 1.5Tb. I followed the document you informed me. but I think there's some detail missing.

However, with static one, I am not getting the link on the Object ID field in the table in the List report. I tried checking everything but could not find what is wrong.

 

Below are the details:

CDS View annotations:

Below how it looks where I am missing link on the Object Number field.

 

Am I missing anything above or specified anything incorrectly?

Thank you,

Bhavik

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Cloud Access
entry.content:
Hi,

No, we use Fiori apps on a web browser. There is no more GUI.

Please see an example here.

Regards,

George

entry.title: SAP Developer News, April 25th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: SAP Developer News April 25th, 2024 – SAP Developers (opensap.info)

Description

ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069

Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code

  • Rupa’s blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrade-sap-business-application-studio-to-sap-build-code/ba-p/13661500

Joule for freestyle UI5 and SAP Fiori elements development

  • Freestyle UI5 development with Joule: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/now-ai-helps-you-developing-sapui5-applications/ba-p/13649767
  • Generative AI as part of SAP Fiori Tools: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-tools-2403-introduces-gen-ai-capability-and-more/ba-p/13650594

SAP Developer Insights 2024 Survey Results

  • The report https://developers.sap.com/insights-survey-results-2024.html

SAP Build Apps Developers Challenge Week-4

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/april-citizen-developer-challenge-sap-build-apps-task-4-mobile-device/m-p/13680103

What’s New in SAP Build – Seamless Integration of Processes and Apps

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-in-sap-build-seamless-integration-of-processes-and-apps/ba-p/13675739

==========================================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 now available!

1:28 Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code

2:21 Joule for freestyle UI5 and SAP Fiori elements development

3:15 SAP Developer Insights 2024 Survey Results

4:30 SAP Build Apps Developers Challenge

5:22 Integration between Build apps and process automation

TRANSCRIPT

Rich: Hey folks, Rich Heilman here, just got back home from the CodeJam Roadshow, and I have some great news for all the ABAP developers out there. Yes, it's true, the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now here and available as a Docker image or as a cloud appliance in the cloud. Last Friday, Julie Plummer announced the news in her blog post where she covers all the details about what's included, some important highlights about the release, as well as links to additional reading about ABAP cloud and extensibility. This is surely welcome news from the community in general as I know that many have been waiting for a local ABAP instance which fully supports the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. This also means, folks, that you now have no excuse not to dig in and try out RAP for yourself. This will be your programming model for the foreseeable future, so make sure to get your ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 and get your hands dirty with RAP today. Special thanks to Julie, Ralph, and the entire team for making this happen. Get coding!  

DJ: A few weeks ago SAP Build Code went G/A. We had an SAP Developer News item about it where we also told you about the test drive period which is coming to an end this week. During this test drive period the team has had some great feedback including a wish to be able to migrate existing SAP Business Application Studio instances to SAP Build Code. Well, now you can do that and you can also even access the projects you've created in SAP Business Application Studio from the DevSpace manager in SAP Build Code. It all revolves around migrating to a new Build Code plan for the subscription. Anyway, check out all the details in Rupa's blog post.  

Nico: Hi, everyone, and welcome to the SAP Developer News. As already announced a few weeks ago, SAP Build Code is now generally available, and it's also part of SAP BTP trial, by the way, which is completely free. One of the highlights of SAP Build Code is Joule, your generative AI assistant, and we wanted to point your attention to a few blog posts written by the UI5 and the SAP Fiori tools team, who show how you can use Joule for your UI5 and SAP Fiori elements development. Joule, of course, is context sensitive, and it knows when you fire up a UI5 resource, for example, an XML view or a JavaScript controller. Then it's best with big tasks, for example, with creating whole new views with routing, etc. in place. Check out the links in the description, try it out, and let us know what you think. Bye.  

DJ: Earlier this year, we ran the fifth annual SAP Developer Insights Survey. It ran for six weeks and we had almost a thousand responses from over fifty countries. Well, the numbers have been crunched and the report has been finalized. there are the usual fascinating statistics, such as the popularity of programming languages, like to see Perl on there, great stuff, and also for example, the IDEs and editors of choice, where's Vim? Anyway, alongside these standard stats, there are also some fascinating insights, including no code, low code usage, awareness of guidance documents, solution architecture, to name but a few. Anyway, the entire report is out, it's published, it's available, so check it out. The link, as always, is in the description.  

Rekha: Hello, everybody. I hope you are all enjoying the spring season. It's an immense pleasure to bring to you the latest news in SAP Build Solution area. I have two key points to emphasize. Number one, you all know we developer advocates are running SAP Build Apps Developer Challenge throughout this April month. This is the last week of this challenge. Our developer advocate, Shrinivasan Neelamegam, has put together this week's challenge, where you learn about the native device capabilities of SAP Build Apps, like GPS, the Global Positioning System, And apply that knowledge to a mobile app that shows relaxing and fun spots like cafes, restaurants, movies around your own locality. It's a powerful feature to learn. Thank you for all those taking part in the challenge so far and we encourage you all to finish this week's challenge as well. Highlight Point 2 If you are eager to know what's new in SAP Build, well here it is. Within SAP Build apps, you can now trigger and consume the business processes that you have created using SAP Build Process Automation. Earlier, the connection between apps and processes was established using APIs. This new feature bridges this gap to provide a seamless integration experience for developers. If you would like to learn the concepts like how to get started, prerequisites in BTP, how to set up the integration, do read up this blog post by our product expert Esmee Xavier for more details. Wish you a great time ahead. Thank you.

entry.title: purchase requisition with release code and (RFQ request) and status 08 release refused
entry.content:
hello good afternoon!

I have a problem with a purchase requisition and would like some advice on where to start.

Purchase requisition flow. I have a document where it followed the Standard approval flow and was fully approved.

Purchase requisition release code with status 2 (RFQ / Order)

But in purchase requisition status with 08 Release refused




 

In the item's modification log, no changes from status 05 released to 08 rejected appear.

 

 

Observation points:

1 - We do not know when the status of the document changes

2 - We cannot debug in the environment.

3 - In the test environment there is no error with the same scenario

4 - Regardless of whether a purchase requisition already exists, an error may occur.

5 - They are only for some purchase requisition cases, but without standard.

I look forward to hearing back and thank you!

#Purchaserequisition
#Purchase #requisition #requisiçaodeCompras #requisiçaodeCompras #RC #requisicao

entry.title: MM
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

I created a STO order and it got blocked on GTS due compliance checks. Now I want to block outbound delivery creation on S4 side whenever the STO order got a block on GTS side.

So, I want to know weather can I use copy controls to automatically block outbound delivery creation? If yes want know how.

or should I need to follow any other methods.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Aditya

entry.title: SAP B1 Business Partner Address Update Error
entry.content:
I'm having 400 Bad Request error when I tried to update a Business Partner's billing address. But it worked for Inserting new Business Partner. Here is a sample request

PATCH  /b1s/v1/BusinessPartners('AC03201')

{

"BPAddresses": [
{
"AddressName": "Test Imaging Site 4",
"Street": "94 Forest Manor Road",
"ZipCode": "M2J 0E5",
"City": "Toronto",
"Country": "CA",
"State": "ON",
"AddressType": "bo_BillTo",
"BPCode": "AC03201",
"RowNum": 0
}
]

}

entry.title: Re: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content:
This is a snippet from one of my dataflows in the WHERE clause.

to_char(RECORDDATE, 'yyyy.mm.dd') > to_char(sysdate()-45, 'yyyy.mm.dd')

entry.title: BusinessObjects 4.2 SP9 to 4.3 latest version
entry.content:
Hi

I am interested in doing an in place update from BusinessObjects 4.2 SP9 to the latest 4.3 version on a Windows Server.

Has anyone written a blog post / SAP note about how to do this ?

Is it easy to do, any License implications ?

Does the Server / Client software still need to match, so I would need to update from 4.2 SP9 clients to 4.3 clients, or can the client stay the same 4.2 SP9 but the server version is the latest 4.3 Service Pack.

Any Gotcha's I need to be aware of.

Thanks.

entry.title: Blending Tables (Import Models)
entry.content:
SAP Documentation says Table blending (import models) is possible. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/d02b8bfddf5844a39fc69fdf586056c8.html

But in ODE I am unable to ( When I hover over in the design panel, its greyed out and it says not supported).

I have linked the dimensions and I am able to blend charts, though just not the tables.

entry.title: Dealy in updating custom values for Visibility Scenario SAP BUILD AUTOMATION
entry.content:
Hi

I downloaded the “Fixed Asset Transfer Approval Management” project from the BUILD project.  The visibility dashboard “com.sap.content.Fixed_Assets_Transfer_Approval” was also downloaded along with this project. I added a new custom attribute “InventoryField” and “InventoryField” for this visibility scenario.

 

On the first day, the values were not populating in the newly added field. I thought that either the value was not present or there is some issue in coding. After many many tries, the value never populated.

 

On 2ND day, when I ran the scenario, the value populated.   After that, I changed the mapping to a new value but the system still showed the old mapping value.   It seems there is a delay in updating values for newly added attributes.

 

Let me know if I am missing anything, these are the steps I performed after each code deployment.  I know many of them are not necessary each time I change code but still, I performed all these steps with the hope that it will update the value in Visibility scenario

 

  1. Business Application studio :
    1. BUILD Project
    2. Then DEPLOY project
  2. Cloud Foundry SUBACCOUNT:
    1. Refresh HTML5 Applications
  3. SAP BUILD:
    1. Go to Lobby a Visibility scenario -- Process -- Reimport Template again and Activate
    2. Go to MonitoringàVisibility Scenario --Process data again (Though we have job after every 5 minutes)
  4. SAP BUILD WORKZONE
    1. Go to Content Channel and click on “Update Content.”

entry.title: Re: ByDesign Reporting Principles explained
entry.content:
Very nicely explained...thank you.

I've a question for this grant/fund managed projects. Is there any functionality whereby we can track spendings and manage budgeting for such type of projects? ( basically looking for a workaround in SAP Byd Industry sector without scoping grant mgmt)

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities

entry.title: How to create Business Roles with required standard apps?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We need new roles with certain apps, different from standard roles. While new roles may be created I found no option to create new catalogs to assign to new roles. How is that fixed? How do we create new roles with required standard apps?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create Business Roles with required standard a...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In S/4HANA Cloud authorization concept, there are Business Catalogs which are objects that provides access to applications and there are Business Roles which are objects containing a bunch of Business Catalogs. 

It's not possible create Business Catalogs to provide access to standard applications. 

If you want to create Business Roles with certain apps, different from the Business Role Templates, you can do this by using the Maintain Business Roles app and selecting the Business Catalogs that you want. 

For this, follow the steps below:

  1. Go to Maintain Business Roles app
  2. Click on "New" 
  3. Add general role details, such as Business Role name, ID and description
  4. On the "Assigned Business Catalogs" tab, select "Add" to add the required Business Catalogs. 

With that, you can select the Business Catalogs that you want. 

 

Check the following documentations:

SAP Help Portal | How to Create a New Business Role

SAP Help Portal | Business Catalogs

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: CAP odata-v2-adapter: batch request is not supported?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have developed an OData service with CAP using odata-v2-adapter. When I try to execute $batch requests to the v2 endpoint, the service returns the following error:

 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "400",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "OData-Version '2.0' is not a supported version."
        },
        "severity": "error",
        "target": "/#TRANSIENT#",
        "ContentID": "cov2ap_1",
        "innererror": {
            "errordetails": [
                {
                    "code": "400",
                    "message": {
                        "lang": "en",
                        "value": "OData-Version '2.0' is not a supported version."
                    },
                    "severity": "error",
                    "target": "/#TRANSIENT#",
                    "ContentID": "cov2ap_1"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

 

In the request body, odata-version: 2.0 is specified.

request url: /odata/v2/sales/$batch

 

--batch
Content-TYpe: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset

--changeset
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

POST SalesOrders HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json
odata-version: 2.0

{
    "orderDate": "2024-04-23",
    "customer": "Postman",
    "items": [
        {
            "product": "PC",
            "quantity": 1,
            "price": 1000
        }
    ]
}

--changeset--

--batch--

 

The error is raised at the following line of code.

If I remove the "odata-version: 2.0" or change the version to 4.0 (inconsistent with the request url though), the request succeeds. This makes calling the v2 endpoint using SAP Cloud SDK (Java) OData v2 client difficult, as the client (seemingly) sets "odata-version: 2.0". 

Is there any solution for this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Business Partner Address Update Error
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you share a screenshot showing the full request, response and the error message?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

Spanish Translations (user UI). The user's language is English, but part screen is available in Spanish.

entry.title: Re: Create and deploy a CAP application with Fiori UI in minutes
entry.content:
Hi, I have followed your tutorial, but after deploying to the Cloud Foundry environment, my app is not loading and shows a blank page. I think there is a problem in the router configuration. Here is the URL of my app: mytest-approuter.cfapps.eu20-001.hana.ondemand.com/mytestui/index.html

However, the URL "/mytestui/webapp/index.html" is working in Business Application Studio.

approuter/xs-app.json

{
"authenticationMethod": "none",
"routes": [],
"welcomeFile": "/mytestui"
}
app/mytestui/xs-app.json
{
"welcomeFile": "/index.html",
"authenticationMethod": "route",
"routes": [
.........

Info: We are using Build Work Zone Advanced Edition.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Integrating CDS action in SAP Mobile Services for Data Retrieval
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently developing an application on BAS using SAP Mobile Services and I've encountered a challenge with integrating an OData service (CDS action) to read data from the following endpoint:

https://***.sap.***.com:PortNr/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zapi_entity_v4/***/sap/zapi_entity/0001/Entity/com.sap.gateway.***.zapi_entity.v0001.getData(serialNr='12345')

My objective is to retrieve data from this service and present it within e.g. Form Cells in the application. However, I am unsure how to proceed in terms of:

  1. Reading the data from the above mentioned endpoint and binding it to Form Cells.
  2. Configuring this integration within the SAP Mobile Service ( SAP Business Application Studio ). Specifically, I am unclear about the most appropriate configuration to use, such as a Rest Service Target, Function Call Target, or another metho
  3. Understanding the best practices and any necessary steps within this integration process.

Could anyone provide guidance or an example on how to properly configure the SAP Mobile Services for this use case? Additionally, any advice on binding the data to Form Cells once it's retrieved would be greatly appreciated

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Khaled

entry.title: CCM Delta accruals calculation
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about delta accruals. I created an invoice 1, a contract, invoice 2 and did a partial settlement. When i run a delta accrual, the partial settlement, the delta accruals for invoice 1 are calculated correctly but in the settlement document also a line is created for an accrual that reverses the Partial settlement.

There should be no accrual for the Partial settlement done, I am using standard configuration. Anyone can tell me how to correct the delta accrual calculation so that no accruals are done Partial settlements?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Struggling with Filters on Select - Fiori App

entry.title: Re: Struggling with Filters on Select - Fiori App
entry.content: Greetings, thank you for the suggestion. The code is helpful; but the problem is when the Select 2 first loads, it will still show all the 6 values irrespective of the value selected in Control 1. The logic above works when I have selected a new value in Select 1 which will of course trigger the change event hence binding new items to Select 2. What I was trying basically is when the Select 1 & 2 are initially loaded on screen; using the expression binding in some way it will send a request to back end with the filter so that it gets the filtered list. Hope I am making sense :).

entry.title: Custom Fields for Goods Receipt Label
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to print goods receipt labels containing information about the goods receipt itself such as material, material description and the date it was posted.

Is it possible to obtain these data fields for printing?

 

Also, Is it possible to add new default values for custom fields when printing goods receipt labels? And is it posible to add more than 4 custom fields?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: Here's my hash: 42534ac9eb7ca5d62c51791fa617770e009092fed87f4bb3c881d04c03221e44
